# Atsell

> Atsell is a Southeast Asian ecommerce enabler — a full-service partner that manages brands' online stores on Lazada, Shopee, and TikTok Shop. We are an official partner of all three platforms. Founded in Singapore in 2019, we have grown sales for 100+ brands across Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, and the Philippines.

## What Is an Ecommerce Enabler?

An ecommerce enabler is different from a marketing agency. A marketing agency handles ads. An ecommerce enabler handles everything: store setup, product listings, customer service, ads, promotions, live selling, and ongoing optimisation. Atsell takes full operational ownership of a brand's marketplace presence so the brand can focus on their product.

## Services

### Store Management
Full setup, optimisation, and ongoing management of Lazada, Shopee, and TikTok Shop storefronts. Includes product listing creation, keyword research, A/B testing of titles and images, participation in platform campaigns, and regular performance reviews.

### Marketing & Ads
Monthly marketing planning and execution across Facebook Ads, marketplace-native ads (Shopee Ads, Lazada Sponsored Products), and platform campaign participation. We manage budgets, creatives, and targeting — and report on ROAS.

### Customer Support
Trained customer service agents handle all buyer enquiries 6 days a week, 9am–6pm. Under 10-second response time guaranteed. Agents are briefed on each brand's products, policies, and tone of voice.

### Liveselling
Professional live commerce hosts run scheduled streams on TikTok Shop, Shopee Live, and Lazada Live. Hosts showcase products, answer questions in real time, and drive impulse purchases. We manage the full production: host, script, props, and scheduling.

## Markets

- **Singapore** — home market, deepest platform relationships, strongest team
- **Malaysia** — active operations, local team
- **Vietnam** — active operations, local team
- **Thailand** — active operations, local team
- **Philippines** — expanding

## Platforms

### Lazada
Official Lazada partner. We manage LazMall and Marketplace stores, run Lazada Sponsored Solutions campaigns, participate in Lazada mega-campaigns (11.11, 12.12, LazSale), and handle fulfilment coordination.

### Shopee
Official Shopee partner. We manage Shopee Mall and non-Mall stores, run Shopee Ads, participate in Shopee-wide campaigns, handle Coins Cashback and voucher strategy, and manage Shopee Live streams.

### TikTok Shop
Official TikTok Shop partner. We manage TikTok Shop storefronts, run TikTok Ads for commerce, manage affiliate outreach, and run regular live selling sessions with professional hosts.

## Results & Track Record

- **100+** active brand clients
- **30+** ecommerce specialists on the team
- **156%** average month-on-month revenue growth across active clients
- **Founded**: 2019

### Case Study: Pharmex Healthcare
A Singapore medical supplies retailer. Atsell launched their ecommerce stores and grew online sales from zero to five figures in Month 1, scaling to $30,000+ per month by Month 12, with 1,157 orders per month at MoM growth of +156% revenue and +205% orders.

### Case Study: Kingswood Industries
A Singapore wardrobe manufacturer focused on offline B2B. Atsell launched their Shopee store and built it to become Shopee's top seller for wardrobes. Revenue grew from $10,000 in Month 2 to $90,000+ in Month 5 (+456% MoM revenue growth).

## Pricing

Atsell's flagship offering is the **12-Month Ecommerce Accelerator** at SGD $2,000/month. This includes:
- 3× done-for-you store management
- Platform marketing analysis report
- Dedicated account manager
- Storefront setup and seasonal refresh
- Monthly marketing planning and execution
- Listing copywriting and design
- Chat management (6 days, 9am–6pm)
- Facebook and marketplace ads execution

Custom pricing is available for larger brands or multi-market engagements. Book a free consultation at https://atsell.io.

## Differentiators

- **Operators, not just managers** — Atsell's team are active practitioners who have managed hundreds of product categories across all three platforms. They understand algorithm changes, campaign mechanics, and category-specific buyer behaviour.
- **AI-assisted, human-led** — AI tools handle repetitive tasks (listing optimisation, ad bid management, reporting). Human judgment handles strategy, client relationships, and escalations.
- **Dedicated account manager** — every client has a named person responsible for their account, reachable directly.
- **Response time guarantee** — under 10 seconds for customer enquiries, 6 days a week.
- **Platform partnerships** — official partner status with Lazada, Shopee, and TikTok Shop gives early access to campaigns, beta features, and platform support.

They are true professionals in the ecommerce space and have supported me tremendously in scaling up my online business."

## Free Tools

Atsell offers a free **Marketplace Fee Calculator** at https://atsell.io/#calculator that calculates exact seller payouts after all platform fees for Shopee Mall, Shopee Non-Mall, Lazada, and TikTok Shop. It accounts for transaction fees, commission rates, coins cashback fees, GST, and voucher deductions.

Atsell also offers a free **Listing SEO Grader** at https://atsell.io/#seo-grader that scores product listing titles for keyword density, length, and search relevance.

## FAQ

**What is an ecommerce enabler?** An ecommerce enabler is a full-service partner that manages every aspect of a brand's online store. Unlike a marketing agency, an enabler handles end-to-end operations: store setup, listing optimisation, marketing, customer service, and logistics coordination.

**Which marketplaces does Atsell manage?** Lazada, Shopee, and TikTok Shop — the three largest ecommerce marketplaces in Southeast Asia.

**Which countries does Atsell operate in?** Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, Thailand, and the Philippines.

**Do I need to already be selling online?** No. Atsell works with brands at any stage — from first-time marketplace launchers to established sellers looking to scale.

**How long does it take to launch?** Most stores are live within 2–4 weeks of onboarding.

**How is Atsell different from a marketing agency?** A marketing agency handles advertising only. Atsell takes full ownership of ecommerce operations and is measured on revenue growth, not ad spend.
